rationale: Plan-vs-spec fidelity is clean. Every requirement is owned by exactly one correct bead: R1/R2/R3 -> Bead 1, R4/R5/R6 -> Bead 2, R7/R8 -> Bead 3, R9 -> Bead 4; R10 (gate-forwardness + full-suite gates) inherited by all four; R11 satisfied by the post-107 base merge b02e236f (plan confirms findRoot count 0, making the carve-out inert); R12 satisfied (4 beads, each appends to a distinct doc). All 16 ACs are mapped in the Provenance table with none orphaned. Spec exclusions are honored: internal/frontmatter is explicitly NOT modified (asserted in Bead 2 verification), internal/adr NOT modified (Bead 3 verification), only internal/trace/** and .golangci.yml are newly claimed, and the only behavioral changes are the two disclosed ones (fence-strictness tightening, approval source-of-truth). No scope creep in any bead's key_file_paths. The R1/R10a same-diff invariant holds because only Bead 1 touches the newly-claimed paths and self-claims in the same diff. The disclosed post-approval commit 9a9359ee is verifiably mechanical: word-diff shows only a colon/em-dash position swap on two domain bullets and `-`->`*` on three attribution notes (plus one blank line); zero prose words changed, spec.md only. Not a semantic edit.
findings: Cosmetic, non-blocking: the plan's Provenance table transposes the AC 12/13 labels relative to the spec's literal bullet order (spec lists validate-diagnostics before the contextpack goldens; plan numbers them the other way). Both ACs are present and mapped to the correct beads (contextpack goldens -> Bead 2, validate diagnostics -> Bead 3), so nothing is orphaned; only the numeric label ordering differs.

Confirmed R5's four migration sites (approve/spec.go splitFrontmatter, approve/impl.go readPlanBeadIDs, contextpack/budgeter.go parseCitedADRs + extractPlanBeadSection strip, validate/plan.go parsePlanFrontmatter) are all covered by Bead 2 step 2.

Confirmed each bead touches a domain doc for every domain whose non-doc source it changes, and the four workflow doc appends (architecture.md, overview.md, interfaces.md, runbook.md) plus context-system/architecture.md are all distinct across beads (R12 no-collision honored).
Disclosed commit 9a9359ee verified purely mechanical via git show --word-diff: no requirement, AC, scope, or ADR-touchpoint text changed.
